requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 as International Baseline for Congo-Brazzaville BESS Project Acceptance (ACONOQ scope unconfirmed)
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619和IEC 62133作为刚果（布）BESS项目验收的国际基准（ACONOQ范围待确认）
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619和IEC 62133作為剛果（布）BESS項目驗收的國際基準（ACONOQ範圍待確認）

summary.en: Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo, capital Brazzaville — distinct from the DRC/Kinshasa) does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation. ACONOQ (Association Congolaise de Normalisation et de la Qualité) is the national standards body; its published scope of regulated products and any mandatory conformity obligation specifically for BESS cells or systems has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. In practice, BESS cell and module safety requirements in Congo-Brazzaville are defined by project specifications, which — particularly for internationally donor/lender-financed solar-hybrid and grid-stabilisation projects — typically require IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) as the baseline cell and module safety standard. IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells) may also be referenced for smaller module configurations. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for Electrochemical-based Energy Storage Systems) is expected at the system level. Exporters should verify whether ACONOQ has adopted or is in the process of adopting any mandatory BESS product conformity requirement before shipment.
summary.zh: 刚果（布）（刚果共和国，首都布拉柴维尔——有别于DRC/金沙萨）目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。ACONOQ（刚果标准化与质量协会）为国家标准机构；截至本数据集日期，其公布的受监管产品范围及任何针对BESS电芯或系统的强制合格评定义务均未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。实践中，刚果（布）BESS电芯和模组安全要求由项目规格界定——尤其对于国际捐助方/贷款方融资的太阳能混合和电网稳定项目，通常要求以IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）作为电芯和模组安全基准标准。对于较小模组配置，也可能引用IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电池安全要求）。系统级预期采用IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）。出口商在出货前应核实ACONOQ是否已采纳或正在推进任何强制性BESS产品合格评定要求。
summary.zht: 剛果（布）（剛果共和國，首都布拉柴維爾——有別於DRC／金沙薩）目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。ACONOQ（剛果標準化與質量協會）為國家標準機構；截至本數據集日期，其公布的受監管產品範圍及任何針對BESS電芯或系統的強制合格評定義務均未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。實踐中，剛果（布）BESS電芯和模組安全要求由項目規格界定——尤其對於國際捐助方／貸款方融資的太陽能混合和電網穩定項目，通常要求以IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）作為電芯和模組安全基準標準。對於較小模組配置，也可能引用IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電池安全要求）。系統級預期採用IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）。出口商在出貨前應核實ACONOQ是否已採納或正在推進任何強制性BESS產品合格評定要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected cell/module safety baseline for Congo-Brazzaville BESS project specifications, especially donor/lender-financed)
IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells (may be referenced for smaller BESS module configurations)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
ACONOQ (Association Congolaise de Normalisation et de la Qualité) — national standards body; mandatory BESS product conformity scope unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with ACONOQ

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaced GB/T 36276 as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in Congo-Brazzaville project specifications set by international project owners or lenders. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance. For equatorial climate contexts such as Congo-Brazzaville, IEC 62619 thermal cycling and humidity test conditions should be reviewed against actual deployment environment to confirm adequacy.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代GB/T 36276，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被国际项目业主或贷款方在刚果（布）项目规格中接受为替代依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书。对于刚果（布）等赤道气候应用场景，须对照实际部署环境审查IEC 62619热循环和湿度测试条件，以确认其充分性。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代GB/T 36276，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被國際項目業主或貸款方在剛果（布）項目規格中接受為替代依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書。對於剛果（布）等赤道氣候應用場景，須對照實際部署環境審查IEC 62619熱循環和濕度測試條件，以確認其充分性。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Congo-Brazzaville project owners, international lenders, and donors reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules — not Chinese GB 44240-2024 or GB/T 36276-2023, which are not accepted as substitutes. ACONOQ's mandatory scope for BESS has not been confirmed; there may be no current mandatory pre-shipment conformity obligation, but project-level IEC 62619 evidence is a practical prerequisite for donor/lender-financed projects. Additional Congo-Brazzaville specific considerations: (a) verify whether ACONOQ has adopted or intends to adopt any mandatory BESS conformity requirement — correspondence with ACONOQ is expected to be in French; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Congo-Brazzaville BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or lender's technical requirements before committing to a test programme; (d) for equatorial deployment, review whether standard IEC 62619 test humidity conditions (typically 90–95% RH) adequately represent continuous equatorial operating conditions in Congo-Brazzaville; (e) system-level IEC 62933-5-2 evidence is also expected for project acceptance by international project owners.
gap.zh: 关键差距：刚果（布）项目业主、国际贷款方和捐助方将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据——而非中国GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023，后者不被接受为替代依据。ACONOQ对BESS的强制范围尚未确认；目前可能不存在强制装运前合格评定义务，但IEC 62619证据是捐助方/贷款方融资项目的实际前提条件。刚果（布）特定注意事项：（a）核实ACONOQ是否已采纳或拟采纳任何强制性BESS合格评定要求——与ACONOQ的往来预计以法语进行；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至刚果（布）BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或贷款方技术要求中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）对于赤道地区部署，审查标准IEC 62619测试湿度条件（通常为90–95% RH）是否充分反映刚果（布）的持续赤道运行条件；（e）国际项目业主对项目验收也预期要求系统级IEC 62933-5-2证据。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：剛果（布）項目業主、國際貸款方和捐助方將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據——而非中國GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023，後者不被接受為替代依據。ACONOQ對BESS的強制範圍尚未確認；目前可能不存在強制裝運前合格評定義務，但IEC 62619證據是捐助方／貸款方融資項目的實際前提條件。剛果（布）特定注意事項：（a）核實ACONOQ是否已採納或擬採納任何強制性BESS合格評定要求——與ACONOQ的往來預計以法語進行；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至剛果（布）BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或貸款方技術要求中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）對於赤道地區部署，審查標準IEC 62619測試濕度條件（通常為90–95% RH）是否充分反映剛果（布）的持續赤道運行條件；（e）國際項目業主對項目驗收也預期要求系統級IEC 62933-5-2證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where international project owner or lender specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; ACONOQ mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS cells has not been confirmed from publicly accessible sources as of dataset date — verify directly with ACONOQ (correspondence in French)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Congo-Brazzaville as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in project specifications for Congo-Brazzaville, particularly for donor/lender-financed solar-hybrid and grid-stabilisation projects. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for project acceptance. Verify ACONOQ's current regulated-product scope (in French), confirm IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence requirements with the project owner and any appointed lender technical advisor, and review whether standard IEC 62619 humidity test conditions adequately represent Congo-Brazzaville's equatorial operating environment before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，刚果（布）尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是刚果（布）项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准，尤其适用于捐助方/贷款方融资的太阳能混合和电网稳定项目。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足项目验收要求。出货前请以法语核实ACONOQ现行受监管产品范围，向项目业主及任何指定贷款方技术顾问确认IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2证据要求，并审查标准IEC 62619湿度测试条件是否充分反映刚果（布）赤道运行环境。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，剛果（布）尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是剛果（布）項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準，尤其適用於捐助方／貸款方融資的太陽能混合和電網穩定項目。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足項目驗收要求。出貨前請以法語核實ACONOQ現行受監管產品範圍，向項目業主及任何指定貸款方技術顧問確認IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2證據要求，並審查標準IEC 62619濕度測試條件是否充分反映剛果（布）赤道運行環境。
